contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Compact and productive on a south-facing windowsill — one of the best chilies for indoor growing.

notes: Classic hot chili. Compact plant that fruits reliably indoors. Needs warmth and full sun. Can be overwintered indoors and kept for several years. Scoville 30,000–50,000.
